name: Etihad Airways

carryOn.notes: Economy: 1 bag (7 kg). Business: 2 bags (12 kg total). First: 2 bags (12 kg total).

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Etihad include free checked bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, all Etihad fares include at least one checked bag. Economy includes 23 kg, Business includes 2 bags of 32 kg each.
